subcodes.first_line: The Fire hath spoken forth from the Blessed Tree, and the Desired One hath come with glory and power, advancing before all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطقت النار فی السدره المبارکه و اتی المقصود بالعزه و الاقتدار یمشی امام
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
